title: Top-Down View of Colorful Plant-Based Meal Ingredients on Rustic Wooden Table
description: A vibrant top-down view of a variety of fresh plant-based meal ingredients arranged on a rustic wooden table. The assortment includes bowls of chickpeas, lentil soup with herbs, mixed roasted vegetables, fresh leafy greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, corn, black beans, avocado, red onion slices, nuts, seeds, carrots, garlic, ginger, and green pesto. Wooden utensils and a beige napkin complement the natural and wholesome presentation, illuminated by warm natural light.
